items.title: 👀 World Cup kit ranking: All 105 jerseys on show
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup will be the first with 48 teams, bringing a total of more than 100 kits! Here they all are, ranked from worst to first.

items.title: Gill: Physically RCB might have advantage, but finals are all about mental strength
